criteria.name: CRA learns under genuinely temporal encoding above controls
criteria.note: Requires a genuinely temporal encoding plus loss in time-shuffle or rate-only controls.

criteria.name: at least one non-finance temporal task passes
criteria.note: Sensor-control prevents this from being only a finance-shaped task result.

criteria.name: not explained by standard temporal-feature baselines everywhere
criteria.note: External baselines are reviewer-defense references; Tier 5.15 is primarily a spike-timing causality diagnostic.

summary.claim_boundary: Software-only temporal-code diagnostic; not hardware, not custom C, and not a frozen promoted baseline by itself.
